title: Remove proficiency span elements from first, second, and fourth skill cards

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx, remove the three <span> elements identified by the following XPaths from the skill proficiency cards rendered in section 4: (1) /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/span[1], (2) /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/span[1], (3) /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[4]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/span[1]. These are the first span elements inside the inner-most div of the first, second, and fourth skill cards respectively. Remove them from the rendered output entirely so they no longer appear on the page.
acceptanceCriteria: The first span element inside the inner-most div of the first skill card (Photoshop) is completely absent from the rendered DOM.
The first span element inside the inner-most div of the second skill card (Illustrator) is completely absent from the rendered DOM.
The first span element inside the inner-most div of the fourth skill card (InDesign) is completely absent from the rendered DOM.
The remaining content of each affected skill card (icon, label, other elements) is unaffected and still renders correctly.
The Skills section layout and scroll animations remain intact.

constraints: Only modify frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx — do not touch any other file.
Do not alter any other elements within the skill cards beyond removing the specified span elements.
nonGoals: Modifying any other section or component outside of Skills.tsx.
Changing the visual layout or styling of the remaining skill card content.
Adding new content or badges to the skill cards.
